Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $150 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (1% odds) on crude reach $150. Closes in 13d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $70 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Lower-probability outcome (30%) that crude drop below $70. Closes in 13d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $60 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (4% odds) on crude drop below $60. Closes in 13d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $75 in June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Market pricing 96% odds crude will drop below $75. Closes in 14d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $70 in June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Near coin-flip odds (44% YES) crude drop below $70. Closes in 14d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $100 in June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (4% odds) on crude reach $100. Closes in 14d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Economy & Markets.title: Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 70% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 3% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 92% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will 1 Fed rate cut happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 20% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.
